---
name: Content correction
about: Something in the guide is inaccurate or out of date
title: "[correction] "
labels: correction
---

**Where** (page / file path, e.g. `docs/reference/hooks.md`):

**What's wrong:**

**What it should say** (with a source if you have one — ideally a link to
